title: Gulf, Arab states welcome US-Iran deal to end war, reopen Hormuz
description:
DUBAI: Gulf and Arab states welcomed on Monday a US-Iran agreement to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, expressing hope that the deal will pave the way for lasting regional stability and broader diplomatic engagement.

description: Президент США Дональд Трамп оставил инструкции на случай, если Ирану удастся убить его. В интервью The New York Post он заявил, что Тегеран заплатит высокую цену при таком раскладе.

title: PA says external audit proves payments incentivizing attacks on Israelis have ended
description:
Ramallah hoping results of external review will grant legitimacy to welfare reform long demanded by international community and will lead Trump administration to conduct similar assessment
The post PA says external audit proves payments incentivizing attacks on Israelis have ended appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: IDF kills three Hamas commanders, including Oct. 7 invader, in Gaza airstrikes
description:
After pledging 20,000 international peacekeepers to Gaza, US reportedly struggling to deploy just twenty; Israel defends detention of Gaza hospital chief, who is also Hamas officer
The post IDF kills three Hamas commanders, including Oct. 7 invader, in Gaza airstrikes appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: Inside Israel’s push to clear sea munitions, part of global push to protect waters
description:
Israel looking to return a 2-kilometer stretch of shoreline to people living Rishon LeZion after decades of it being used as a firing range, but the task is daunting

title: Ukraine can soon build its own Patriots – but it could take years
description: Ukraine may soon possess a license the U.S. currently extends to only a handful of allies — but it could be years before Patriots protect Ukrainian cities.

title: China shows snazzy clip of DF-17 missile on state TV in show of force
description: Experts say the broadcast answers Asia-Pacific military exercises by other countries, warning the U.S. that the weapons could cause pain in any war.

title: Notes from a NATO Summit: An Estonian Perspective
description: As the week draws to a close following the NATO summit in Ankara, a clearer picture is emerging of what was happening behind closed doors inside the Presidential Compound as the alliance's 32 leaders met. Among the revelations, reports from The Wall Street Journal and The Times of Israel suggest President Trump's team was rapidly adjusting plans amid what appeared to be an ongoing Iranian assassination threat. Away from the main sessions, the sum

title: ‘Weaker’? Mojtaba Khamenei’s absence from father’s funeral may signal shifting role for Iran leader
description: Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei has not been seen in public since he was wounded in the US-Israeli air strikes that killed his father and wife – even at their week-long funeral ceremonies this week. While his injuries and the threat of assassination could well have played a role in his disappearance, analysts suggest it may also signal a changing role for the country's top position.

title: Spain-Belgium live: La Roja take command with Fabian Ruiz early opener
description: Spain and Belgium clash in a tasteful quarter-final encounter on Friday, with both European nations seeking to reach the World Cup semi-finals in a 1986 rematch. The Roja and the Red Devils bring contrasting styles and experiences to this knockout tie, but only one of them will advance to face France in the final four. Follow our liveblog to see our minute-by-minute commentary.

title: Can the agreement between Iran and the US be rescued?
description: Latest attacks jeopardise ceasefire and memorandum of understanding.

title: Eliminated Morocco turn attention to cohosting 2030 World Cup
description: Morocco were eliminated from the 2026 World Cup by a 2-0 defeat by France in the quarterfinals, but host next edition.

title: Hospital workers wounded in Israeli drone attack on Gaza’s Kamal Adwan
description: Palestinian Health Ministry denounces attack as part of Israels systematic targeting of health facilities.

title: All the best looks from Paris Haute Couture Week 2026
description: Scorching temperatures in the French capital accompanied the hottest week in haute couture.

title: Polish nationalists protest commemoration for Nazi-era Polish massacre of Jews
description:

title: Outsiders with major chops lead Fed task forces
description: Federal Reserve chairman Kevin Warsh has created five task forces to rethink the central bank's policymaking process. title: Zelenskyy taps European allies to build Freya, a cheaper Patriot-alternative to Russia’s ballistic missiles
description: Ukraine will hold its first coalition meeting on a homegrown ballistic missile defense system in France “in the coming days.”
